title: tally/labels/prefer-stable-order rule config
description: Configuration options for the tally/labels/prefer-stable-order rule.

order.description: Comparator to use when checking key order. "oci-logical" groups OCI and ecosystem keys by purpose; "lexical" sorts purely alphabetically.

sort-unknown.description: When true, custom reverse-DNS keys are clustered by namespace and sorted lexically within each namespace. When false, custom keys keep their relative source order.
